chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No.S-1157 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to non-prosecution of CMA No.8522/2023 17.11.2025. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ This case since beginning was fixed for non-prosecution. This case was instituted 01.11.2023. Then it was fixed before the Court on 22.11.2023 and 08.04.2024 when none was present on behalf of Petitioner. Matter was again fixed on 07.05.2024 and it was observed that if none appeared on the next date of hearing, appropriate orders would be passed. Case was again fixed on 10.10.2025 & 17.10.2025 but on both the dates of hearing none turned up. It appears that the parties have lost interest in pursuing this petition which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE
